scripts.validate:all: bash scripts/validate-pack.sh && bash scripts/smoke-typecheck.sh && bash scripts/smoke-package-tests.sh
scripts.ci:bootstrap: bash scripts/validate-pack.sh && bash scripts/smoke-typecheck.sh && bash scripts/smoke-package-tests.sh
scripts.migrate: node --loader ts-node/esm --no-warnings scripts/migrate.ts || tsx scripts/migrate.ts || node -e 'console.log("run after pnpm install + tsx or build")'
scripts.dev: node --loader ts-node/esm --no-warnings -e 'console.log("Start db with: docker compose up -d db && pnpm migrate ; then node apps/api/src/server.ts & (cd apps/web && npm run dev or next dev)")' || echo 'See README / plan for full dev setup (docker + pnpm install needed)'
